midnight-ink.$description: Midnight Ink — Primary text, ghost/outline action borders, filled dark buttons — near-black with a faint green undertone carries both editorial type and CTA strokes

lime-voltage.$description: Lime Voltage — Brand accent, active states, highlight tags, energetic punctuation — the single chromatic accent that gives the white canvas its electric charge

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Page canvas, card surfaces, button fills — the foundation everything sits on

olive-stone.$description: Olive Stone — Muted helper text, secondary icons, neutral badge borders, low-emphasis UI chrome

soft-mist.$description: Soft Mist — Hairline dividers, subtle surface edges, low-contrast separators

peach-wash.$description: Peach Wash — Category card accent — warm pastel surface for color-coded product groupings

sky-wash.$description: Sky Wash — Category card accent — cool pastel surface for color-coded product groupings

mint-wash.$description: Mint Wash — Category card accent — fresh pastel surface for color-coded product groupings

vend-sans.$description: Custom display + label typeface. Headlines run at 43–61px weight 600/700 with tight negative tracking (-0.033em to -0.023em) for a compressed, editorial feel. The same family doubles as small all-caps labels at 11–13px with wide positive tracking (+0.039em to +0.045em) — a deliberate dual register: whisper-quiet labels, assertive display.

system-ui.$description: Body and supporting text. Stays at 16px with 0.031em tracking — deliberately understated so Vend Sans can lead. No custom body face: the system font is the quiet workhorse, and custom type is reserved for moments of emphasis.

paper-white.$description: Surface level 0: Primary page canvas — everything sits on this

soft-mist.$description: Surface level 1: Hairline dividers and low-contrast separators

category-pastel.$description: Surface level 2: Color-coded category card surfaces (warm variant)

category-pastel-cool.$description: Surface level 3: Color-coded category card surfaces (cool variant)

category-pastel-fresh.$description: Surface level 4: Color-coded category card surfaces (fresh variant)
